summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one clarifies the direct return from the mainland into the mosque assembly, and one carries Nura's neighboring-char thread and the schoolyard split cleanly into the pre-dawn opening of Chapter 12. The visible adjacent opening uses a different scaffold, so no opening-paragraph rebuild was needed for diversity.
edits: Clarified that Halima and Nura came straight back from the mainland before the mosque-yard assembly.
Added Nura's hand on the blue folder and the penciled neighboring-char name to the final paragraph.
Adjusted the closing image so the whole schoolyard resolves into the 'house list' and 'blood list' split that Chapter 12 remembers.
